title: Low multimodal fatigue
content: Driver shows low fatigue across camera, lane, and steering. PERCLOS is low, yawning is low, lane keeping is stable, and steering behavior is normal. Use Fan Level 1, Music Off, Vibration Off. Reason should mention that passive monitoring is enough.

title: Medium camera fatigue from blink rate
content: Driver shows medium camera fatigue with increased blink rate but no strong lane or steering instability. Use Fan Level 2, Music On, Vibration Off. Reason should mention increased blink rate and early fatigue signs.

title: Medium camera fatigue from yawning
content: Driver shows medium camera fatigue with increased yawning rate. Use Fan Level 2, Music On, Vibration Off. Reason should mention yawning and reduced alertness.

title: High visual fatigue with PERCLOS and yawning
content: Driver shows high visual fatigue. High PERCLOS and high yawning indicate strong drowsiness. Use Fan Level 3, Music On, Vibration On. Reason should mention high PERCLOS and yawning.

title: Medium lane instability
content: Driver shows medium lane instability. SDLP is increased and lane keeping ratio is reduced, but the situation is not yet severe. Use Fan Level 2, Music On, Vibration Off. Reason should mention lane variation and reduced lane keeping.

title: High lane departure frequency
content: Driver shows high lane fatigue. Lane departure frequency is high and lane keeping is poor. Use Fan Level 3, Music On, Vibration On. Reason should mention repeated lane departures and unstable lane behavior.

title: Medium steering fatigue
content: Driver shows medium steering fatigue. Steering entropy and steering reversal rate are increasing. Use Fan Level 2, Music On, Vibration Off. Reason should mention irregular steering behavior.

title: High steering instability
content: Driver shows high steering fatigue. Steering angle variability, entropy, and reversal rate are high. Use Fan Level 3, Music On, Vibration On. Reason should mention unstable steering and high steering variability.

title: Camera high and lane medium
content: Driver shows high camera fatigue and medium lane instability. Visual drowsiness is dominant and lane keeping is becoming unstable. Use Fan Level 3, Music On, Vibration On. Reason should mention high visual fatigue and lane variation.

title: Camera medium and steering high
content: Driver shows medium camera fatigue with high steering instability. Steering behavior suggests strong control irregularity even if visual fatigue is moderate. Use Fan Level 3, Music On, Vibration On. Reason should mention steering instability and moderate visual fatigue.

title: Lane high and steering high
content: Driver shows high lane and steering fatigue. Lane departure and steering instability together indicate unsafe driving behavior. Use Fan Level 3, Music On, Vibration On. Reason should mention lane and steering instability.

title: Multimodal high fatigue
content: Driver shows high fatigue across camera, lane, and steering. Multiple modalities confirm strong drowsiness. Use Fan Level 3, Music On, Vibration On. Reason should mention multimodal high fatigue and need for strong alert intervention.
